 Hi Xin,
 
 Would you please forward this mail to Rich for me?
 I sent mail to Rich and you yesterday.
 But mail to Rich was rejected by mail system at host batman.acm.jhu.edu.
 
 I had fixed the bug of what you reported.
 
 But this bug is cause by cam_periph_error(..) in sys/cam/cam_periph.c rather
 than by arcmsr driver.
 For one target id there have devices with LUN other than 0, if any one LUN
 device reported CAM_SEL_TIMEOUT, it will call xpt_create_path(..) to create
 a path with CAM_LUN_WILDCARD parameter. This will cause xpt_async(..) to
 remove device entry of all LUN devices of that target id.
 This seems does not reasonable.
 
 In my opinion, it is better to use xpt_path_lun_id(ccb->ccb_h.path) instead
 of CAM_LUN_WILDCARD parameter in calling xpt_create_path(..) .
 
 Thanks,
 Ching 2010/07/16
